epigraph.quote: The farmer came to visit, bringing an enormous old wasps' nest in a 'black sack' that he'd just removed from his roof.

per_stop.quote: There were pigeons nesting next to the loos in the Castle. They were setting up a stage for Othello.
We drank Magda's present - Zubrovka made out of bison grass. Delicious. Deceptively easy to drink!
We went to Stokesay Castle + each listened to a tape recording of its history as we wandered around.
At any time they had 5,000 men working on them, 12,000 men were on the books.
We are next to running water & there are cows on the flat valley bottom.
We found a church service, Matins in Welsh, warm welcome, at Tregaron.
